command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2eJZ6uYkQqqj2tc.root --database EVvjYMQDCpqg6oqAYCDCXo --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE achievements;
stdout:
Table	Create Table
achievements	CREATE TABLE `achievements` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `code` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `icon` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `category` enum('frequency','milestone','pr','streak') NOT NULL,
  `requirement` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `points` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '10',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `achievements_code_unique` (`code`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
